title: AP-61 Supersession Metadata v1
description: Frontmatter contract that the gbrain ranker (or a local Nous-controlled reranker shim) reads at query time to demote superseded pages. Per autoplan v1 (full 6-voice, 2026-04-30), this v1 deliberately uses NO `status:` field — that field is already used by 782 existing wiki pages with 129 distinct values (`reviewed`, `draft`, `active`, `final`, `complete`, `alias-redirect`, ...). Supersession is signaled purely by the PRESENCE of `superseded_by:` (verified: only 6 existing uses across the vault, all already-supersession markers).

superseded_by.description: Wikilinks to the current authoritative page(s) that replace this one. PRESENCE of this field IS the supersession signal — no separate boolean/enum needed.

items.description: An Obsidian wikilink in the form `[[slug]]` or `[[skills/<name>/skill]]`. The validator transitively resolves the chain and rejects on dangling wikilinks, cycles, or depth > 2.

superseded_at.description: ISO 8601 date when the supersession was recorded.

superseded_reason.description: One-line rationale for why this page was superseded. ≤140 chars, no shell-injectable chars (backtick, $, \, newline).
